title: Per-service SLO (canary gate)
description: Per-service SLO file consumed by cd-production.yml for SLO-driven canary thresholds (ADR-0073). The `canary` block is read via yq at the 5%/25% promotion steps and the error-budget gate.

service.description: Service name; must match docs/sre/slo/<service>.yaml and the deploy target.

error_rate_max.description: Max acceptable 5xx error ratio during canary (fraction, not percent).

p99_latency_seconds_max.description: Max acceptable p99 request latency during canary, in seconds.

error_budget_min_ratio.description: Promotion is blocked if remaining error budget is at or below this ratio.
